steps.title: Read the angle relationships from the figure
steps.content: From the figure, angles $x$ and $y$ are vertical angles at the intersection of the transversal and line $m$, so $x=y$. Angles $y$ and $z$ are same-side interior angles formed by the transversal cutting the parallel lines $m$ and $n$, so $y+z=180^{\circ}$.

steps.title: Solve for k using x = y
